name: Circuit Fabology Microelectronics Equipment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Circuit Fabology Microelectronics Equipment Co.,Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the development and manufacturing of equipment used in the production of semiconductors and integrated circuits. The company's products are used for etching, deposition, and other critical processes in semiconductor fabrication. Circuit Fabology Microelectronics Equipment Co.,Ltd. is headquartered in China.
